case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LUIS CARLOS RUIZ PEREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-17-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-18-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALISTS. DEFENDANT LUIS CARLOS RUIZ PEREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUIS CARLOS RUIZ PEREZ IS NOT PRESENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT ARE SWORN IN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
